title: Mobile Field Technician Experience
description: Deliver a cross-platform mobile application for field technicians that supports iOS and Android, works fully offline with reliable data synchronization, and enables digital work order completion, photo capture, digital sign-offs, and compliance checklists on-site.
business_value: Eliminates paper-based processes and manual data re-entry, reducing the work-order-to-invoice cycle from 2-3 weeks to days and improving technician productivity.
acceptance_criteria: Field technicians can view, update, and complete work orders on iOS and Android devices
The app functions fully offline and synchronizes data with conflict resolution when connectivity is restored
Technicians can capture photos, digital signatures, and compliance checklists on-site
The app supports 200 concurrent field technicians across the full deployment

title: Work Order Management & Approval Workflow
description: Implement a digital work order lifecycle system supporting creation from multiple triggers (customer calls, maintenance contracts, future IoT alerts), asset linkage to IBM Maximo, and a two-level approval workflow (supervisor then finance) before invoicing.
business_value: Streamlines the end-to-end work order process, eliminating manual re-entry bottlenecks and reducing the invoice cycle from weeks to days.
acceptance_criteria: Work orders can be created from customer calls and maintenance contract triggers
Work orders are linked to specific customer assets in IBM Maximo
Completed work orders pass through supervisor sign-off and finance review before invoicing
The entire workflow is digital with no paper forms or manual data re-entry required

title: Scheduling, Dispatch & Fleet Tracking
description: Replace the manual whiteboard-and-phone-call dispatch process with an automated scheduling and dispatch system. Integrate with FleetComplete for real-time technician location tracking to optimize job assignment.
business_value: Automates dispatch operations, reduces scheduling errors, and enables location-aware job assignment — directly improving response times and technician utilization.
acceptance_criteria: Dispatchers can schedule and assign work orders through an automated digital interface
The dispatch interface displays real-time technician locations from FleetComplete
The dispatch UI is intuitive enough for the existing team to use with minimal training
Manual whiteboard and phone-call processes are fully replaced

title: Parts & Inventory Integration
description: Provide technicians and dispatchers with real-time parts availability through SAP S/4HANA integration. Enable proactive parts verification before dispatch to reduce second-visit rates.
business_value: Reduces the 30% first-visit failure rate caused by parts unavailability, improving customer satisfaction and eliminating costly return trips.
acceptance_criteria: Technicians can check real-time parts availability from SAP before traveling to a job site
The system proactively verifies or suggests required parts for a work order before dispatch
SAP integration uses modern API-based approaches replacing legacy stored procedures
First-time fix rate improvement is measurable through platform analytics

title: Customer Self-Service Portal & Notifications
description: Build a customer-facing self-service portal where customers can view work order status in real time. Implement automated status notifications (technician en route, job complete) to replace manual dispatcher calls.
business_value: Addresses a direct competitive gap that caused a lost contract renewal, and reduces dispatcher workload by automating customer communications.
acceptance_criteria: Customers can log in and view the real-time status of their work orders
Automated notifications are sent at key milestones (technician dispatched, en route, job complete)
The portal is accessible via web browser without requiring app installation
Manual status update calls from dispatchers to customers are eliminated

title: Reporting, Analytics & Dashboards
description: Deliver three tiers of dashboards: operational dashboards for the dispatch team (real-time job status, technician utilization), executive KPI dashboards for leadership (time-to-resolution, first-time fix rate), and system health monitoring for IT.
business_value: Provides operational visibility that does not exist today, enabling data-driven decisions across dispatch, leadership, and IT operations.
acceptance_criteria: Dispatch team has access to real-time operational dashboards showing job status and technician utilization
Executive leadership can view KPI dashboards including average time-to-resolution and first-time fix rate
IT team has system health monitoring dashboards with alerting capabilities
All dashboards update in near-real-time without manual data pulls

title: Identity, Security & Access Control
description: Implement Azure AD (Entra ID) SSO integration with Contoso's existing tenant and configure role-based access control (RBAC) to restrict data access by role. Ensure sensitive customer contract data is only accessible to account managers and above.
business_value: Secures the platform with enterprise-grade identity management while ensuring compliance with data access policies and simplifying user authentication.
acceptance_criteria: All users authenticate via Azure AD SSO using Contoso's existing tenant
Role-based access control restricts technicians to only the data they need
Sensitive customer contract data is accessible only to account managers and above
No separate credentials or login systems are required

title: Compliance, Document Retention & Audit Trail
description: Implement document retention and audit trail capabilities for compliance documentation including photos, digital sign-offs, and checklists. Ensure all compliance records are retained for a minimum of seven years with full traceability.
business_value: Meets regulatory requirements for utilities and oil & gas customers, protecting Contoso from compliance risks and supporting long-term document retention mandates.
acceptance_criteria: All on-site compliance documentation (photos, sign-offs, checklists) is captured digitally and stored with audit trail metadata
Compliance records are retained for a minimum of seven years
All customer data resides within the United States
Audit trail supports traceability of who created, modified, or accessed compliance records

title: Teams Integration & Technician Notifications
description: Integrate the platform with Microsoft Teams to deliver work order notifications and enable technician interaction directly within Teams. Leverage the existing Teams adoption among field technicians to drive platform adoption.
business_value: Maximizes user adoption by meeting technicians where they already work — in Microsoft Teams — reducing training requirements and accelerating rollout.
acceptance_criteria: Technicians receive work order notifications in Microsoft Teams
Technicians can view and interact with work orders directly from Teams
Teams integration works on both iOS and Android Teams mobile clients
No additional app installation is required beyond the existing Teams app

title: Platform Infrastructure & Phased Rollout
description: Establish the Azure-native hosting infrastructure, configure US data residency, build comprehensive API documentation for custom components, and implement a phased rollout strategy supporting parallel operation with the legacy system during transition.
business_value: Ensures the platform meets enterprise infrastructure requirements and enables a low-risk migration from the legacy system before the Q4 2026 end-of-life deadline.
acceptance_criteria: The platform is hosted on Microsoft Azure with all customer data residing in the US
The system supports parallel operation with the legacy system during phased rollout
Comprehensive API documentation is published for all custom-built components
The SAP S/4HANA integration is rebuilt using modern API-based approaches
Pilot deployment for ~40 technicians in the highest-volume region is completed by month 6
